title: pavonia rotundifolia
intro: Pavonia rotundifolia, also known as Roundleaf Pavonia or Rose Mallow, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pavonia rotundifolia include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
